item.title: Public Speaking Fear
item.description:
Have you ever faced your fear?

One of my fear is speaking in public. I was a train wreck when it came to public speaking. My hands will be shaking and cold sweats coming down my forehead. I forget all my material and stumble clumsily through the presentation.

So, I decided to face my fear and be better by joining a public speaking course.

For the past month I’ve been going to public speaking class from Dialogika. The class is small and focused. The instructor is very competent, experienced and approachable. The curriculum is extensive and easy to follow.

The most important thing is they provide a safe space to practice my speaking in front of audience and get a constructive feedback every time. It’s so nice to have that real feedback loop.

Tomorrow is my last class and the progress has been great. I feel calmer and more confident when talking. I am still not perfect and still have much to learn. But I have been growing and it makes me happy.

item.title: Agency
item.description:
Here’s what I learn today:

Everyone has a dream, but most are not strong enough to follow it. You need agency: initiative, bravery and strategy.

Initiative: start small. Get the ball rolling. It won’t be perfect. Learn and grow better.

Bravery: introduce yourself. Don’t hide behind the keyboard. Show what you offer. Embrace the criticism. Be honest and listen.

Strategy: think and do. Make plan. Produce something. Evaluate and adjust.

Success is not guaranteed. But without agency you don’t deserve it.

item.title: Algoritama

item.title: Quranic Arabic
item.description:
I helped establish Quranic Arabic Indonesia. A community of people teaching and learning to read arabic to learn the Quran.

Website: https://quranicarabic.id

item.title: Lingkar Kecil

I founded Lingkar Kecil. A study group to learn about islamic concepts and knowledge.

Instagram: https://instagram.com/lingkarkecil
